description: Composition Brown kurta made of a blended fabric, has a mandarin collar, brown chest placket with a hooked closure and lace at the ends, short sleeves with brown piping and lace on the cuffs and shimmery traditional gold coloured print Fit Regular Wash care Dry clean only Vintage weaves, classic cuts and contemporary style - all come together in this kurta from diva. Crafted from a soft blended fabric, it offers exemplary comfort all day. Pair it with patialas or churidars and embellished slippers for an ethnic look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5’9”, chest 33” and shoulders 15.5”
